name: Curried Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 whole chicken breasts, cooked in stock
2 tablespoons chicken broth (from where chicken was cooked)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the chicken in chicken broth.
2. Let the chicken cool in the broth, then drain it, saving 3 to 4 tablespoons of the broth.
3. Cut the cooled chicken into bite-sized pieces.
4. Mix together the remaining ingredients and add them to the chicken.
5. Chill.
